svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/141.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.7"> <diagram id="rpi_rtlsdr_case" name="RPi + RTL-SDR Case Layout"> <mxGraphModel dx="1244" dy="618" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="700" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="plywood_box" value="Plywood Box (4mm, oiled)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#8B5A2B;fillColor=#D2A679;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="100" width="600" height="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="divider" value="Metal Divider (0.5mm Cu/SS)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;fillColor=#BBBBBB;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="250" width="600" height="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="top_cover" value="Metal Top Cover (flanged)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#444444;fillColor=#B0B0B0;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="90" width="580" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bottom_cover" value="Metal Bottom Cover (flanged)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#444444;fillColor=#B0B0B0;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="390" width="580" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rpi" value="Raspberry Pi 4 (lower side)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;fillColor=#CCCCCC;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="280" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rtl_sdr" value="RTL-SDR V4 (upper side)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;fillColor=#DDDDDD;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="170" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="connector_wall" value="Connector Wall (SMA RF + USB Power)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;fillColor=#BBBBBB;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="120" width="20" height="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dim_width" value="100 mm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=10;" parent="1" source="plywood_box" target="connector_wall" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dim_depth" value="150 mm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=10;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="400" y="420" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="400" y="560" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dim_height" value="50 mm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=10;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="720" y="150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="720" y="400" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ground" value="Common Ground Point" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=#FFFF00;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="650" y="360" width="30" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" value="Silicone gasket between metal and wood; IPx4 rated; drain holes on bottom." style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;align=left;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="440" width="500" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
